__comment_format: Keys are rule IDs. Values are lists of process paths that should NOT trigger the rule.
__comment_edit: Prefer `maccrabctl suppress <rule-id> <process-path>` — it writes here and reloads the daemon.
__comment_reload: Send SIGHUP after editing: pkill -HUP com.maccrab.agent (release) or pkill -HUP maccrabd (dev).
__comment_hint: Keys starting with '__' are ignored by the loader and exist only for documentation in this file. Real entries don't need them.
__comment_pattern: For pattern-based suppressions (ruleTitle + processName tuples) the dashboard's 'Suppress All Like This' button writes to a separate file managed by AppState.
